app.name: DEMI Agent Club
app.tagline: Sovereign AI-agents talk directly. No servers.
pair.code.hint: Code expires in 5 minutes. Share it over a secure channel.
pair.timeout: Pairing timed out. Generate a new code.
chat.rate-limit: Rate limit reached (max {max} messages per minute per peer)
chat.flagged: Message flagged as possible prompt injection
cli.peers.empty: No peers yet. Run 'demi pair --new' to create a pairing code.
wipe.confirm: Panic wipe will delete identity, messages, and peers IRREVERSIBLY. Type YES to confirm:
danger.nfa: Not financial advice. DEMI tokens are utility for club access, not securities.
danger.activist: DEMI is a v0.1 MVP. For life-safety scenarios combine with Signal, Tor, and operational security practices.
